memoryArtifacts.headline: Calverley William and Agnes Tempest marriage record in Calverley Charters 1442 pg 251
memoryArtifacts.description:
Charter #348  pg 251
Indenture made between Sir John Tempest, knight, of the one part, and Walter Calverley, esquire, of the other part, being an agreement for the marriage of William Calverley, son and heir apparent of Walter and Agnes Tempest, daughter of Sir John. (before the Pentecost next). It also names Walter's wife as Elisabeth and his father as Sir Walter Calverley, knight. It names William's brothers as Thomas and Robert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Markenfield於大約1401年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Thomas Markenfield23歲，母親Beatrice Sothill28歲。她於1415年3月1日與Walter Calverley, Esq.結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年3月10日在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年50歲，埋葬在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Markenfield was born about 1401, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Markenfield, was 23 and her mother, Beatrice Sothill, was 28. She married Walter Calverley, Esq. on 1 March 1415. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 10 March 1450, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Markenfield est née environ 1401, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Markenfield, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Sothill, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Calverley, Esq. le 1 mars 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1450, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

März 1415 Walter Calverley, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Calverley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Markenfield è nata il circa 1401 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Markenfield, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Sothill, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Walter Calverley, Esq. il 1 marzo 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1450, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Markenfieldが約1401年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Markenfieldは23歳，母Beatrice Sothillは28歳であった。1415年3月1日にWalter Calverley, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年3月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Markenfield(이)가 대략 1401년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Markenfield(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Sothill(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1415년 3월 1일 Walter Calverley, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 3월 10일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Markenfield nasceu aproximadamente 1401, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Markenfield, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Sothill, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Calverley, Esq. em 1 de março de 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1450, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Markenfield родилась около 1401 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Markenfield было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Sothill, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Calverley, Esq. 1 марта 1415 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 10 марта 1450 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.
